flags.concern: Agent chat integration: the plan still assumes agent edits arrive through `applyResolvedConfigEdit`, but in this repo agent output refreshes the timeline via query invalidation/realtime, so those changes will still bypass history when polling/reload commits are marked `skipHistory`.
flags.evidence: `applyResolvedConfigEdit` is only used in `src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useClipEditing.ts:219,259,272,326` and `src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useTimelineTrackManagement.ts:174,315,327,340,363,439`; there is no agent-chat callsite. Agent sends invalidate the timeline query in `src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useAgentSession.ts:288-295`, realtime invalidates the same query in `src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useTimelineRealtime.ts:27-47`, and `useTimelineSave` applies polled data through `commitData(..., { save: false })` in `src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useTimelineSave.ts:340-374`. Because the revised plan explicitly marks polling/reload paths as `skipHistory`, the claimed 'agent chat edits participate in undo' behavior is still not wired to the repository's actual agent-edit path.

flags.concern: Checkpoint counting: transaction-collapsed gestures still count once per low-level commit toward the 30-edit auto-checkpoint cap.
flags.evidence: The repository's multi-clip keyboard move still loops `moveClipToRow` for each selected clip in `src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useTimelineTrackManagement.ts:296-298`, and each call commits through `applyTimelineEdit` at `src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useTimelineTrackManagement.ts:131-136`. The revised plan adds a shared `transactionId` so undo entries collapse, but its checkpoint logic still says to increment `editsSinceCheckpoint` on each commit. A single Arrow Up/Down gesture on 5 clips would therefore consume 5 of the 30 edit-distance slots and auto-checkpoint earlier than intended.

flags.concern: Plan structure: completeness warning remains because at least one numbered step still lacks a repo file reference.
flags.evidence: The validator still reports `Each step section should reference at least one file in backticks.` In the current draft, `### Step 14: Manual testing protocol` is a numbered step with no file reference, so the plan still misses the requested per-step file anchoring.
